case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. DANIELA CASTRO MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-08-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVADO LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT DANIELA CASTRO MARINEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $556.03 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, DANIELA CASTRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
